ValidationRule.description: Require Mailing Address for NATT End Customer
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NATT_Record_Type_Developer_Name__c = 'NATT_End_Customer', OR( ISBLANK(MailingCity), ISBLANK(MailingCountry), ISBLANK(MailingState), ISBLANK(MailingStreet), ISBLANK(MailingPostalCode) ), NOT(ISNEW()))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Mailing Address is required (Street, City, State/Province, Zip/Postal Code, Country)
